step.successMessage: You combine the two bars into an ingot of high quality.
step.failMessage: You combine the two bars into an ingot.

step.successMessage: You skillfully add the diamond powder to the essence. Swirling the mixture causes it to become thick.
step.failMessage: You add the diamond powder to the essence. The powder settles to the bottom, and the mixture remains thin

step.successMessage: You apply the diamond oil to the ingot, making a perfect diamond infused ingot.
step.failMessage: You apply the diamond oil to the ingot, crafting a superb diamond infused ingot.

step.successMessage: You skillfully add the diamond powder to the essence. Swirling the mixture causes it to become thick.
step.failMessage: You add the diamond powder to the essence. The powder settles to the bottom, and the mixture remains thin

step.successMessage: You skillfully add the chorizite powder to the essence. The mixture bubbles briefly, and settles into a deep purple hue.
step.failMessage: You add the chorizite powder to the essence. The mixture bubbles over the top of the decanter, you release it just in time to avoid it touching your hands.

step.successMessage: You skillfully add the oil to the diamond heart, changing it.
step.failMessage: The heart refuses to drink the fluid and remains unchanged.

step.successMessage: You skillfully carve a servicable device for removing Empyrean stones from Isparian Weapons.
step.failMessage: You clumsily destroy the treated golem heart.
